name: Mournblade
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Guardian Champion
factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Undying
uniqueTraits.text: When Mournblade is knocked out, he is worth 1 step instead of 4. When an enemy is knocked out, Mournblade may immediately make a rally action.

ultimate.name: Grasping Dead
ultimate.text: Remove all Knightshades from the battlefield. Then place all three Knightshades on hexes that are within 3 hexes of Mournblade.

plotSkills.name: Grave Summons
plotSkills.text: Mournblade makes a claim action. You may place his banner on any objective hex within range.

plotSkills.name: Forward, Minions!
plotSkills.text: Move each Knightshade that is within range up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Death Wind
clashSkills.text: If Mournblade's banner is within range, place it on an objective hex within range.

clashSkills.name: Raise Dead
clashSkills.text: All friendly champions within range may make a rally action.

clashSkills.name: Soul Cleave
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The Knightshades make a recruit action.

traits.name: Death Grip
traits.text: Enemy models that make an advance action while they are adjacent to a Knightshade have speed 0 during that advance action.

plotSkills.name: Careful, Master
plotSkills.text: If Mournblade is within range, he gains {dodge_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Where's Master?
plotSkills.text: If Mournblade is within range, he may make a rally action or move up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Death's Door
clashSkills.text: If the Knightshades made a recruit action this activation, Death's Door has +1 {accuracy_die} and {damage_die}.
